creator: dokas@oitsec.umn.edu
text:
sysutils/autopsy needs to be updated to 2.20 or better due to a dependency on
the d* commands in sleuthkit.  These commands were renamed to blk* when sleuthkit
was pulled up to version 3.0.

Here's more information on this issue:

  http://www.nabble.com/error-when-running-autopsy-td20080160.html

Fix: 

Update sysutils/autopsy to version 2.20 or greater
How-To-Repeat: Build, install and attempt to run sysutils/autopsy
